title: AWBI – Stenographer Grade I – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: AWBI Stenographer Grade I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Animal Welfare Board of India (AWBI) has released the official notification for Stenographer Grade-I Recruitment 2026 for 1 post. Candidates with a Degree from a recognised University can apply offline by submitting the application form before 29 May 2026 through the official website awbi.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree from a recognised University or equivalent

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AWBI Stenographer Grade I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
